groups.title: Product Vision
groups.intent: Lock the elevator pitch and the user model before architecture decisions cascade.

questions.prompt: Hey Duncan — when a user clicks the Dimitri button on a partner site, what's the first thing they should see — a Dimitri-branded welcome, the ATO MyGov OAuth flow direct, or a partner-branded intro screen?
questions.tmm_prompt: If partner-branded, how much customisation per partner — colours only, full theme, or fully bespoke?
questions.downstream_impact: Drives partner-onboarding contract template (white-label vs co-brand vs full-takeover).

questions.prompt: Who is Dimitri primarily for — the end taxpayer (consumer), the partner's professional user (broker / agent), or both with different views?
questions.tmm_prompt: If 'both with different views', does the professional ever see the taxpayer's session live, or only the final packet?
questions.downstream_impact: Drives RBAC architecture + two-sided vs one-sided UX. 'Both' adds ~30% to Sprint 1 scope.

questions.prompt: Give me one sentence — "Dimitri is like X but Y" — that we can lock as the elevator pitch from Day 1.
questions.downstream_impact: Locks website hero copy + Day-14 demo voiceover script + investor-deck framing.

groups.title: Must-Haves
groups.intent: Define the MVP gate; missing any of these kills partner network sign-on.

questions.prompt: Which ATO data fields are non-negotiable for MVP — full pre-fill (income + deductions + offsets + medicare + HELP), or just the income block?
questions.tmm_prompt: If full pre-fill, do we need to handle private-health rebate edge cases at launch?
questions.downstream_impact: Full pre-fill is ~3x the integration surface. Determines Sprint 1 timeline.

questions.prompt: Lodgement to which Tax Agent system is mandatory at launch — XPM (Xero Practice Manager) only, or also Reckon Elite / MYOB AE / Thomson Reuters Onesource?
questions.tmm_prompt: If 'one other', which one and why — biggest current partner base?
questions.downstream_impact: Drives Sprint 2-3 integration partner outreach + commercial-terms negotiation. XPM-only is fastest path; others double timeline.

questions.prompt: What's the must-have payment gate before NOAH (post-lodgement agent) triggers — Stripe upfront, broker-billed escrow at lodgement, or post-pay after Notice of Assessment?
questions.tmm_prompt: If broker-billed, who owns the receivable risk — the broker, the partner, or us?
questions.downstream_impact: Drives payment rail integration + fraud / chargeback model + cash-flow timeline for Duncan's business.

groups.title: Wish List
groups.intent: Shape the 12-month roadmap so we build the right second product, not the second-easiest.

questions.prompt: Beyond ITR — DIY Home Loans next, or something else from your list (financial planner workflow, lawyer estate-document drafter, payroll-tax employer flow)?
questions.tmm_prompt: If 'something else', what — keep it to one sentence.
questions.downstream_impact: Locks Month-6+ roadmap and informs shared-engine-vs-per-product-silo architecture.

questions.prompt: Which integration would 10x the partner network the fastest — a Xero plugin, a deeper MyGov connector, a financial-planner referral surface, or something else?

What's the "wow" demo moment you'd want on the marketing reel — Dimitri handling a curly D13 deduction live, NOAH catching a fee discrepancy, or the partner getting the full ITR packet drop into their XPM in real time?
questions.downstream_impact: Locks Day-14 Demo Reel storyboard + Cinematographer brief.

groups.title: Constraints
groups.intent: Hard limits. Miss any of these and launch fails.

questions.prompt: Is there a hard launch date — Day-N from signature, fixed to EOFY (1 July), tied to a partner commitment, or no hard date yet?
questions.tmm_prompt: If 'Day-N' or 'partner commitment', what's the specific date?
questions.downstream_impact: Locks sprint cadence + critical-path identification. EOFY = ~46 days from signature; very tight.

questions.prompt: Which regulator is the binding constraint — ATO, AFSL, ASIC, AUSTRAC, or all of the above — and have you spoken to anyone there yet?
questions.tmm_prompt: If you've engaged any, can you intro the contact, or do we go cold?
questions.downstream_impact: Drives compliance work-stream priority + which advisor we engage first.

questions.prompt: Last one — what's the single thing that, if we get it wrong on Day 1, kills the partnership network — pricing, branding, data privacy, or compliance evidence?
questions.tmm_prompt: Why? What's the partnership network most sensitive to from your conversations so far?
questions.downstream_impact: Locks the 'Day-1 non-negotiable' risk register entry; this gets daily attention until launch.
